title: thelypteris pyrrhorhachis
intro: Thelypteris pyrrhorhachis, also known as the golden shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Thelypteris pyrrhorhachis include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
